scripts.// dev: Runs the local development server in watch mode at http://127.0.0.1:8080 (kills stale listeners first)
scripts.// start: Starts the production-like static server without watch/auto-reload
scripts.// validate: Zod-validates pages/*.js and js/page-data.js for schema shape and business invariants
scripts.// export: Generates data/page_inventory.{json,csv} and syncs the local tracking sheet
scripts.// sync-tracking: Re-generates the local mockup tracking CSV sheets
scripts.// push-tracking: Pushes the local page review status to the Google Sheets tracker
scripts.// build: Executes full build pipeline: validate -> export -> build workshop form -> compile single-file review page
scripts.build: bun run validate && bun run export && bun run build:workshop-form && bun build_scripts/build-single-file.js
scripts.// build:workshop-form: Installs dependencies and runs Vite production build for the embedded mosquito request sub-form
scripts.build:workshop-form: bun install --cwd forms/mosquito-workshop-request && bun run --cwd forms/mosquito-workshop-request build
scripts.// build:netlify: Validates pages and assembles the netlify deployment bundle inside the dist/ directory
scripts.// format: Runs Prettier to automatically format all files in place
scripts.// format:check: Checks files for formatting compliance with Prettier (acts as the project's linter)
scripts.// test: Runs the test suite using Bun's test runner
scripts.test: bun test tests/utils.test.js tests/data-validation.test.js tests/page-render.test.js tests/csv.test.js tests/review-state-schema.test.js tests/reading-level.test.js
scripts.// test:e2e: Playwright end-to-end tests (starts static server on :8080)
scripts.// vendor:browser: Rebuild IIFE bundles for Fuse.js and defu used by index.html
scripts.vendor:browser: bun build node_modules/fuse.js/dist/fuse.basic.mjs --outfile=js/vendor/fuse.js --format=iife --global-name=Fuse && bun build node_modules/defu/dist/defu.mjs --outfile=js/vendor/defu.js --format=iife --global-name=defu
